## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this pull request.

## Motivation & Context
Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? If it fixes an open issue, link it here: Closes #

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (structural code enhancements without functionality changes)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Verification & Testing
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Include details of your testing environment.

### Test Log Output
```bash
npm run test
```

## Checklist
- [ ] All unit and integration tests pass successfully (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compilation succeeds without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] ESLint checks pass without warnings (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Prettier formatting has been applied (`npm run format`)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated to reflect the changes
- [ ] Breaking changes have been noted in the description
